name: codegraph_explore
description: PRIMARY TOOL — call FIRST for almost any question: how does X work, architecture, a bug, where/what is X, or surveying an area. Returns the verbatim source of the relevant symbols grouped by file in ONE capped call (Read-equivalent — do NOT re-open shown files). Query can be a natural-language question OR a bag of symbol/file names. Usually the ONLY call you need — answers without further search/node/Read/Grep.

query.description: Symbol names, file names, or short code terms to explore (e.g., "AuthService loginUser session-manager", "GraphTraverser BFS impact traversal.ts"). Use codegraph_search first to find relevant names.

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files to include source code from (default: 12)

projectPath.description: Path to a different project with .codegraph/ initialized. If omitted, uses current project. Use this to query other codebases.
